Uses of Class
codedraw.TextFormat

  • Uses of TextFormat in codedraw

    Methods in codedraw that return TextFormat
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TextFormat
    Image.getTextFormat()
    Defines the styling of drawn text.
    TextFormat
    TextFormat.setBold(boolean isBold)
    Defines whether the drawn text is bold.
    TextFormat
    TextFormat.setFontName(String fontName, String... fallbackFontNames)
    Defines the font of the drawn text.
    TextFormat
    TextFormat.setFontNameToDefault()
    Sets the font-name property to its default value Font.DIALOG.
    TextFormat
    TextFormat.setFontSize(int fontSize)
    Defines the font size of the drawn text.
    TextFormat
    TextFormat.setItalic(boolean isItalic)
    Defines whether the drawn text is italic.
    TextFormat
    TextFormat.setStrikethrough(boolean isStrikethrough)
    Defines whether the drawn text is strikethrough.
    TextFormat
    TextFormat.setTextOrigin(TextOrigin textOrigin)
    Defines the origin of the drawn text relative to the position specified in the Image.drawText(double, double, String) method.
    TextFormat
    TextFormat.setUnderlined(Underline underline)
    Defines the underline styling of the drawn text.

    Method
    Description
    void
    Image.setTextFormat(TextFormat textFormat)
    Defines the styling of drawn text.
